notes: Corrects spore handling for puffballs, Amanita buttons, Verpa, morels, exposed jelly surfaces, toothed fungi, artist’s conk, wood ear, and lobster mushroom.
Separates mature internal gleba color from conventional cap-on-paper spore prints and keeps morel or Verpa print color secondary to structural safety checks.
Adds source-backed fertile-surface wording without changing food routes, review status, visible images, or image-rights metadata.
